description_long: This is a large, single-story residential house set within a spacious, fenced property surrounded by lush trees and landscaping. The house features multiple interconnected sections with flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a prominent driveway leading to a covered carport and garage area. The grounds include several outbuildings, such as sheds and a circular water tank, as well as paved walkways and garden beds. The main structure is finished in light gray and white tones, with numerous windows of varying sizes distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property is enclosed by a brick and metal fence, with a wide front gate and decorative pillars. The overall layout suggests a modern ranch or contemporary suburban style, emphasizing open space and outdoor amenities.
description: A sprawling, single-story modern house with flat roofs, surrounded by trees, gardens, and outbuildings, all enclosed by a brick and metal fence. The property features a large driveway, multiple windows, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, carport, and the majority of the landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, additional garden areas, and the arrangement of windows and outbuildings along the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, two outbuildings, a circular water tank, and more trees, with the house's rear facade and patio areas visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entrance, more garden beds, and the continuation of the fence and tree line.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with steps, covered porch, and a large driveway leading to a carport; minimal decorative elements.
